title: Descent into the Hold
summary: The party arrives at Vaelthar's Hold, pushes through the entrance hall past skeleton sentinels, and discovers the guard room occupied by a cult lieutenant coordinating the excavation.

scenes.title: The Ash Gate
scenes.body: A rusted iron portcullis hangs half-raised in the yawning mouth of Vaelthar's Hold. The air reeks of char and old stone. Footprints in pale ash lead inward.

scenes.title: Entrance Hall
scenes.body: Two skeleton sentinels stand motionless in alcoves. They animate and attack the moment a living creature crosses the threshold rune etched in the floor. The rune glows faint violet when active.

scenes.title: The Guard Room
scenes.body: A scarred half-orc in ashen robes — Cultist Lieutenant Vorra — directs two skeleton soldiers while studying a crumbling wall map. She does not expect resistance this deep in the hold.
